error_signature: clipboard access blocked in insecure context
title: Clipboard access blocked due to insecure context
symptom: Users are unable to paste nodes in n8n when accessing it over HTTP on a local server. The copy function works, but pasting does not occur.
root_cause: Modern browsers restrict clipboard access to secure contexts, which means that if n8n is accessed over HTTP (not HTTPS), clipboard operations like pasting will be blocked silently by the browser.
fix_steps: Access n8n via 'localhost' if on the same machine.
Set up a reverse proxy with SSL (e.g., using nginx and Let's Encrypt).
Alternatively, add your n8n URL to Chrome's insecure origins allowlist by visiting 'chrome://flags/#unsafely-treat-insecure-origin-as-secure'.
agent_instruction: Try accessing n8n via 'localhost' or set up SSL to enable clipboard operations.
